steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The final sentence is the key signal: Villasana sees both approaches as ways of depicting the power and interconnectedness of all people. The main idea must capture both the diversity of her subjects and their unified purpose.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'famous and everyday people recognized for human strength and connection': matches exactly — both subject types, both themes. ✓
  • Choice B — 'chronological transition in her style': invents a timeline the passage never mentions. ✗
  • Choice C — 'scholarly reception of her work': introduces critical response the passage doesn't discuss. ✗
  • Choice D — 'comparison within a single work': misreads the passage, which contrasts two bodies of work, not elements within one piece. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
